game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **RPG エルピシアの魔剣少女 (RPG Elpisia's Magic Sword Girl):** RPG エルピシアの魔剣少女 is a single-player JRPG featuring turn-based combat and 2D pixel-art exploration, controlled via tap-to-move and menu navigation. In combat, players manage character HP, MP, and Action Points (AP), where "magic sword skills" and "weapon skills" consume AP, which can be fully recovered by sacrificing a turn with the "Charge" command. The unique mechanic involves the character Eris transforming into a "magic sword" for Aldo, allowing him to equip and utilize up to three distinct weapons, each potentially offering different skills, to engage in strategic battles. Character progression involves gaining experience to level up (up to Lv 999), enhancing weapons (up to +999), and acquiring new skills, while pets can join as "buddies" to provide combat advantages. The game features exploration of towns and dungeons, with the main objective being to advance the story by completing quests and defeating bosses, and includes "post-clear enjoyment" content for extended play.
game_info.description: Enter the world of Elpisia as Aldo, a warrior who fights alongside Eris, a magical sword maiden. Battle through dungeons in turn-based combat, managing HP, MP, and Action Points (AP) to unleash devastating weapon skills. Transform Eris into powerful magic swords that unlock unique abilities. Level up, enhance your weapons, and defeat increasingly challenging enemies to save the kingdom. Strategic use of skills and the Charge command to recover AP is key to victory!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate menus and move in exploration mode
Space: Confirm selection / Interact
Z: Cancel / Back in menus
Enter: Start game
ESC: Pause / Unpause game
R: Restart (return to start screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Basic movement and combat interaction test. Validates that the player can navigate menus, select actions in combat, and that the game responds correctly to inputs. Tests the fundamental game loop.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Navigate through menus using arrow keys and space. Enter combat and test basic attack commands. Verify that menu selections work and combat progresses correctly with random action selection.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The game should respond to all inputs, menus should navigate properly, combat should execute actions without errors, and the game should continue running without crashes or stuck states.

TEST_2.test_description: Win condition test. Implements an optimal combat strategy to defeat all enemies and reach the GAME_OVER_WIN state. Tests the complete gameplay loop from start to victory.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Use strategic combat decisions: prioritize high-damage weapon skills when AP is available, use Charge to recover AP when needed, and use basic attacks when AP is low. Focus on defeating enemies efficiently while managing HP with defensive strategies.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully defeat all waves of enemies, complete all combat encounters, and trigger the GAME_OVER_WIN condition. The test is successful when gameState.gamePhase becomes "GAME_OVER_WIN".

TEST_3.test_description: Resource management test. Validates that the player properly manages HP, MP, and AP resources throughout extended combat. Tests the Charge mechanic and skill usage optimization.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Successfully manage resources throughout multiple combat encounters without running out of HP. Demonstrate effective use of the Charge command and resource-efficient skill usage patterns.
